title: glyceria distans subsp. pseudodistans
intro: Glyceria distans subsp. pseudodistans, also known as mannagrass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of mannagrass include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and soothe digestive problems. Mannagrass is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
